description: Crystal Raiders Patch 1 (24 January 2024) — Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Sweeping Bolt (Heavy Crossbow) Slightly increased the projectile hitbox

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs

subitems.text: Adjusted spell logic to improve large scale fighting performance
Channel Tick Interval: 0.5s → 0.75s (enemies are still immune to buffs between ticks)
Damage Debuff per Tick: 4% → 5% (stacks up to 5 times)

subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Dark Matter (all Curse Staffs) Damage vs Players: 73 → 78 Damage vs Mobs: 36.7 → 39 Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staff) Adjusted spell logic to improve large scale fighting performance

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Flaming Phoenix (Dawnsong) Fixed missing AoE Escalation

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Ice Shard (all Frost Staffs) Damage: 118 → 125

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Energy Regeneration Factor (all Shapes): 4.5 → 3 Distortion (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Damage: 70 → 60 Slow Strength: 20% → 10% Sinister Swipe (Prowling Staff) Damage: 90 → 76 Hellfire Barrage (Hellspawn Staff) Damage per Tick: 32 → 30 Powerful Impact (Earthrune Staff) Damage: 65 → 40

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Infernal Boulder (Hellfire Hands) 1st Bolder Bounce Damage: 220.5 → 210 2nd Boulder Bounce Damage: 147 → 140 3rd Boulder Bounce Damage: 73.5 → 70

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Hover (Sandals of Purity) Move speed Increase: 50% → 60% Frost Walk (Druid Sandals) Move speed Increase: 55% → 60%

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Bows Rain of Arrows (Longbow) Crossbows Sweeping Bolt (Heavy Crossbow) Cursed Staffs Dark Matter (all Curse Staffs) Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staff) Fire Staffs Flaming Phoenix (Dawnsong) Frost Staffs Ice Shard (all Frost Staffs) Shapeshifter Staffs Energy Regeneration Factor (all Shapes): 4.5 → 3 Distortion (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Sinister Swipe (Prowling Staff) Hellfire Barrage (Hellspawn Staff) Powerful Impact (Earthrune Staff) Spears Breakthrough (Daybreaker) War Gloves Infernal Boulder (Hellfire Hands) Shoes Hover (Sandals of Purity) Frost Walk (Druid Sandals)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: The Heretic Warsteed mount skin is now tradable on the Marketplace
Fixed issue where activities selected in the Guild Finder were ignored when searching
Fixed issue where guild names and item names were not clickable in ingame mails
Fixed issue where zerg and tutorial markers on the minimap had a thicker than intended border
Fixed issue where zerg markers would appear on minimaps of multiple regions, when accessed via the world map
Fixed issue where Settings menu could not be opened with ESC key
Fixed issue where mob camp completion rates in the Mists were not displaying on the region map
Fixed issue where character nametags would sometimes not display correctly
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where Destiny Board node UIs would run past screen edge
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where virtual joystick was sometimes offset
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where control settings would not update the spell button layout when set to Tap Controls and "spells on bottom"
[CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where Inventory could not be opened via button press
[MOBILE / CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where, when using a controller, spells could not be cast while transformed by Shapeshifter Weapons or in vanity mode
Additional minor graphical, animation, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
